The diff supplied contains zero changes to the three target files (`cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/executions/+page.svelte`, `executions/[id]/+page.svelte`, `commits/+page.svelte`). Re-run review against the merge that includes `17e60317` so the actual Svelte changes are visible.
The bead description lists concrete styling expectations (mono-code hashes in accent-lever, terminal-bg panes for timeline/log, sharp badges) but no formal `<acceptance/>` items. Add explicit AC (e.g., "hash spans use `font-mono` + accent-lever token", "log/timeline pane uses `--terminal-bg`", "badges use `rounded-none` + token colors") so future iterations have a deterministic pass/fail.
